reasoning: The key sprite has warm gold/amber shaft tones that align with parchment-gold and sunset-orange quadrant of the Echoes palette, and small sky-blue accent dots are on-spec. However, the diamond key head is a flat neutral mid-grey — desaturated, neither warm nor a colored dark — which conflicts with the BRIGHT/WARM requirement. More critically, the four display-panel backgrounds are cold charcoal near-blacks, violating the spec that shadows be colored darks (deep teal, plum, or warm brown) rather than pure grey/black. The last cream-background panel reads better. Overall palette breadth is narrow: gold + grey + tiny blue + near-black, with no greens, no candy pinks, and minimal warmth in shadow areas. Mood reads as restrained/muted treasure-item rather than vibrant Echoes-tuned BRIGHT WARM. The core key silhouette shape and gold tones are salvageable; the grey head should shift to a warm tinted hue (parchment ivory or warm copper highlight) and any dark staging areas must use deep teal or warm plum as shadow color.
